headlines.title: First Surgeon to Sew Up Human Heart
Exposure of the Cocaine Traffic
headlines.fullText: The illicit sale and use of cocaine and other habit-forming drugs in this city (as well as all other cities) is much greater than the public knows about. We, with several other druggists in Texas, have been trying for several years to stamp out as near as possible this terrible traffic. We know if the public could see some of the real life of the habitual user of some of these drags they would greatly assist us in every way possible. We would like for everyone in Fort Worth to sea this exposure in moving pictures at the Airdome Seventh and Throckmorton Streets Tonight

advertisements.description: A crisp, clean, nutritious food. For everybody-everywhere. Fresh in the moisture-proof package.
The funny little name of the famous little ginger snap that puts fresh "snap" and "ginger" into jaded appetites.
The natural sweetness and nutriment of the wheat are retained, giving them a delightful flavor.
Exposure of the Cocaine Traffic in moving pictures.
Cured dandruff, pimples and rash on scalp.
